programme.title: The Making: Azhar
programme.desc: The life of Indian cricketer and former national team captain Mohammad Azharuddin

programme.title: Sabhapathy
programme.desc: Sabhaapathy, a man with a speech impairment, desperately looks for a job to earn a living. One day, his life turns upside down as he ends up with a corrupt politician's suitcase filled with money.

programme.title: Lage Raho Munna Bhai
programme.desc: The spirit of Gandhi comes to life in the sequel to Munna Bhai.

programme.title: An Evening In Paris
programme.desc: Deepa goes to Paris to find love, and she meets Shyam, an amiable gentleman. However, since Shekhar needs to marry her in order to clear his debts, he replaces Deepa with her lookalike.

programme.title: Mere Apne
programme.desc: A man meets a widow in a village and claims to be her relative. He takes her to the city and makes her work as a housemaid without any wages. She is rendered homeless when she learns the truth.

programme.title: Kgf: Chapter 2
programme.desc: Rocky takes control of the Kolar Gold Fields and his newfound power makes the government as well as his enemies jittery. However, he still has to confront Ramika, Adheera and Inayat

programme.title: Hichki
programme.desc: After numerous rejections, a woman who has Tourette's syndrome lands a job as a teacher at an elite school. She tries to do whatever she can to make her troublemaking students realize their potential.

programme.title: Bhool Bhulaiyaa 2
programme.desc: When strangers Reet and Ruhan cross paths, their journey leads to an abandoned mansion and a dreaded spirit who has been trapped for 18 years.

programme.title: Raaz
programme.desc: Sanjana and Aditya go to Ooty for a holiday to save their unsteady marriage. However, Sanjana is haunted by a spirit who reveals some dark secrets about Aditya and his past.

programme.title: Heyy Babyy
programme.desc: Three compulsive womanisers find a baby left at their doorstep. However, chaos ensues as they try to contact their ex-lovers to determine who the father could be.

programme.title: Tiger Zinda Hai- Extra Shots
programme.desc: Salman Khan returns as Tiger in this action packed drama, who joins forces again with secret agent Zoya (Katrina Kaif) to help on a rescue mission in Iraq. Featuring hit song Swag se Swagat. (2017)

programme.title: The Making Of Hichki
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Mubarakan
programme.desc: Identical twin brothers turn to their eccentric uncle for help to make sure that they each marry the woman they love.

programme.title: Extraa Shots- Bewakoofiyan
programme.desc: Mohit a marketing whiz kid and Mayera, the financial brain with a penchant for shoes, are a couple in love but lacking money. Can you survive on just love and fresh air? (2014)

programme.title: Extraa Shots- Daawat-E-Ishq
programme.desc: A story of Gullu (Parineeti Chopra) who, frustrated by dowry seeking men, decides to reverse the tables on Taru (Aditya Roy Kapoor), a charming chef who owns a restaurant in Lucknow. (2014)

programme.title: Deewana Main Deewana
programme.desc: Basant always gets what he wants and when he falls in love with Priya at first sight, he wants her to be his. Later, he impersonates his friend Vasant, who had saved her life before, to win her over.

programme.title: Nawabzaade
programme.desc: Nawabzaade is a Hindi movie starring Raghav Juyal, Punit Pathak and Dharmesh Yelande in prominent roles. It is a romantic-comedy directed by Jayesh Pradhan.

programme.title: Ramji Londonwaley
programme.desc: This is the story about Ramji, who is a skilled cook and flies to London to try his luck in work. It is the story about his journey and life in London.

programme.title: Kahani Kismat Ki
programme.desc: A reformed man tries to make an honest living for himself and his family after his jail term. His life takes an ugly turn when a woman claims him to be her husband and he is also framed for murder.

programme.title: Satyamev Jayate 2
programme.desc: As an anti-corruption bill stalls in the government and doctors go one strike, a vigilante delivers his own justice and becomes a hero.

programme.title: Malang
programme.desc: Advait visits Goa where he meets Sara, a free-spirited girl who lives life unshackled. Opposites attract and all goes well until life turns upside down

programme.title: Kaarnaama
programme.desc: Suraj is very fond of his horse Chetak. However, Rana, a millionaire, is upset when Chetak wins majority of the races and plans to kill Suraj and the horse.

programme.title: Michael
programme.desc: Michael, a gangster mentored by a Mumbai-based crime boss, aspires for greater things in life. However, an assassination mission and unexpected love complicate his goals.

programme.title: Main Hoon Lucky The Racer
programme.desc: Two brothers have two different approaches to life. While one brother follows rules and regulations, the other does things his own way.

programme.title: Ek Tha Tiger-Extra Shots
programme.desc: India's secret agent Tiger (Salman Khan) is hired on a government mission and falls in love with the enemy (Katrina Kaif). Will their love be accepted or fight their own beliefs to be together? (2012)

programme.title: Extraaa Shots Of Wazir
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Kill Dil
programme.desc: Dev and Tutu are brothers who were abandoned as kids when Bhaiyaji decides to adopt them and thrust them into a world of crime.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise
programme.desc: (Dual Language - English and Malay) Legendary Blader Valt Aoi has been training the next generation of elite Bladers at Spain's BC Sol. One day, rookie Bladers Dante Koryu and Delta Zakuro witness Valt unleashing his newly evolved Gamma Bey, Sword Valtryek. To their surprise, Valtryek radiates a golden light as it rockets around the stadium. Inspired by the limitless possibilities of this "Hyper-Flux" state, both Dante and Delta seek the same bond with their Beys.

programme.title: Janji Sedap
programme.desc: Join our chef as he takes you to a culinary journey and learn how to whip up vibrant and flavoursome cuisine.

programme.desc: Jasmine ignores Andy's desperate attempt to woo her as she needed some space for herself after her recent breakup with Elyas.

programme.title: Kelab J

programme.title: Putri Mahkota
programme.desc: Mr Hanif's joy in witnessing the advancement of his company through Aruna's assistance, Rania remains hesitant to accept any help from Mr Hanif. She seems to have personal reasons for not wanting to receive help from Mr. Hanif.

programme.title: Detik Semasa
programme.desc: The program analyses and dissect issues of concern to the Malay/Muslim Singaporeans - be it at the community level, national, regional or global. Apart from raising awareness, each DETIK episode hopes to set viewers thinking and make informed decisions on matters that can impact their lives.

programme.title: Hard to Heart
programme.desc: Hard To Heart Series 2, showcases how selected artists share their feelings and thoughts with renowned host, Datuk Aznil Haji Nawawi.

programme.title: Do You Love Me Captain?
programme.desc: Darish is at wit's end as to what to do because Daneena refuses to speak to him. He orders Raisya to come to his home to persuade Daneena to forgive him.

programme.desc: Irma confronts Hakim after seeing him being friendly with Sarah at Sarah's cafe. Laila returns to her village for the first time in a while.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise
programme.desc: (Dual Language - English and Malay) Legendary Blader Valt Aoi has been training the next generation of elite Bladers at Spain's BC Sol. One day, rookie Bladers Dante Koryu and Delta Zakuro witness Valt unleashing his newly evolved Gamma Bey, Sword Valtryek. To their surprise, Valtryek radiates a golden light as it rockets around the stadium. Inspired by the limitless possibilities of this "Hyper-Flux" state, both Dante and Delta seek the same bond with their Beys.

programme.title: Abhayam
programme.desc: Director, Writer and Actor Nagharaj who has cynophobia is not able to face any dogs in his life. He gets frozen and starts running away from the place. There have been several incidents where he had to leave his shooting spot or his friend's house as there was a dog in sight. Nagharaj suspects that this phobia may have developed way before during his NS days. Listen to him open up and let's see if he overcomes his fear in this final episode.
